name: Helloworld Travel Limited
analysis: HLO has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 26% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.5150, stop A$1.3266, target A$1.8471 (1.76:1) — then trail it.
